summary: Freeze normative/process stack for the branch-reset thread and align plans, gate map, and tranche laws with the rebuilt execution baseline.
Planned and executed Gates 141-143 to add a replay store, carry-forward replay methods, and make persistence tests green under the rebuilt execution baseline.
Re-executed Gates 146-149 from a fresh baseline to restore late-session temporal fields, event-tagging, decision traces, and carry-forward/replay proofs on branch-reset main.
Installed registry-v2 and carry-forward law surfaces and routed the repo to the rebuilt execution baseline with Gates 46-50 complete on main.
Locked Step 0 calendar/horizon ownership, stage boundaries, and implementation map for Gate 51 on main.
Wrote the Gate 59-62 testing/evaluation planning stack including proof order, market-context overlays, evaluation harness boundaries, and walk-forward/full-year pilot law.
Installed the Phase 4 testing successor pack on main, preserving the Gate 59-62 work as evidence while routing the repo to Gate 63.
Completed Gate 63 on main by freezing the test-harness invocation matrix and repo-root orchestrator proof order, then routing the pack to Gate 64.
Completed Gate 64 on main by freezing the micro-batch proof order, heavy-node constraints, and closeout receipt requirements, then routing the pack to Gate 65.
Completed Gate 65 on main by freezing failure-pack routing, anti-blind-run law, and subset replay requirements, then routing the pack to Gate 66.
Completed Gate 164 on main by freezing the parallel risk lane foundation pack and integrating final policy routing, child veto, and scorecard join authority.
Completed Gates 144-156 on main by freezing stage-local handoff and terminal-risk seam law and carrying the corrective successor pack to closeout.
Admitted the canonical real raw runtime bundle and linked it to the prepared runtime fixture pack without changing runtime code.
Activated the main-target repair programme after the repo drift audit, routing the repo to Gate 192 with Gates 193-199 planned and freezing the tranche documents as canonical authority.
Completed Gates 192-199 on main by closing normative, vocabulary, control-surface, runtime-semantics, calendar typing, helper pressure, and final static hygiene drift against the target repo.
Created a separate Port C testing-planning repo, authored stage-owned proof lattice, proof family matrix, and execution protocols, and closed the repo with a bounded planning proof slice green.

Activated a canonical target-repo successor planning pack after Gate 199, retired standalone Gates 200-212 from authority, added a contradiction report and salvage matrix, and routed the repo to Gate 200 with Gates 201-205 planned.

Activated a canonical target-repo successor planning pack after Gate 199, retired standalone Gates 200-212 from authority, added a contradiction report and salvage matrix, and routed the repo to Gate 200 with Gates 201-205 planned.

Complete Gate 201 on main by freezing the repo-native evidence inventory baseline, provenance and immutability rules, change-memory states, and bounded proof slice for later evidence-governance work, then route the successor pack to Gate 202.
Canonised GitHub as the primary execution ledger for normal gate work, retired routine zip handoff to backup-only or explicit-request use, and documented the transition in repo governance surfaces.

Complete Gate 202 on main by freezing the evidence coverage scorecard and gap-register baseline, redundancy-versus-strengthening rules, semantic-review disagreement memory, and the bounded proof slice for later review-governance execution, then route the successor pack to Gate 203.

Complete Gate 203 on main by freezing the target snapshot handoff bundle contract, real-anchor collection and admission dossier rules, and the bounded snapshot/collection proof matrix, then route the successor pack to Gate 204.

Reconcile Gate 204 on top of the live Gate 203 base by restoring the missing Gate 203 planning surfaces named by the canonical changelog, freezing the first repo-native DMP failure-pack families, setting the schema/example/validator boundary, and routing the successor pack to Gate 205 after the bounded Gate 204 proof slice runs green.

Complete Gate 205 on the successor-pack closeout branch by authoring a deterministic pack index and cross-reference surface, freezing the closeout proof order and receipt requirements, defining the planning-to-coding handoff boundary, closing the successor pack without inventing Gate 206, and routing the repo to no active pack currently routed.

Bootstrap Gate 206 on a fresh work branch by importing the authored workflow-hardening pack artefacts from the repo-root zip without rewriting them, routing the repo to the new active pack, and adding one narrow planning proof for the new bootstrap state.

Close Gate 206 truthfully after its authored bootstrap and non-fast-forward merge to main by recording the actual receipts, marking the Gate 206 leaves complete, routing the active pack to Gate 207 on the Gate 207 work branch, and narrowing the Gate 206 planning proof to state-transition invariants.

Complete Gate 208 on the template-pack rewrite branch by replacing routine zip-first briefing defaults with GitHub-native execution-ledger law, updating the active workflow-hardening pack state to Gate 209, and narrowing the template-pack proof to the live workflow invariants.

Install the slim-successor bootstrap pack in the successor repo, route the repo truthfully to Gate 217, replace the runtime-surface ledger with the rescoped rewrite, add the specialised AGENTS read-trigger, and stop before any Gate 218+ audit execution begins.

Complete Gate 217 on the existing successor work branch by marking LEAF-G217-001 through LEAF-G217-003 complete, recording live closeout receipts, moving the routing quartet to Gate 217 complete with Gate 218 planned but not yet activated, and rerunning the targeted Gate 217 planning proof slice without starting Gate 218.

Complete Gate 218 on the successor retained-surface inventory branch by freezing the actual retained successor baseline, verifying the installed rescoped docs/07 ledger plus matching AGENTS read-trigger without claiming runtime semantics changed, closing the quartet to Gate 218 complete, and routing the pack to Gate 219 planned but not yet activated.

Complete Gate 219 on the successor retained-test inventory branch by freezing the canonical retained-test family baseline, mapping each retained family to doctrine, owners, consumers, and explicit state signals, closing the quartet to Gate 219 complete, and routing the pack to Gate 220 planned but not yet activated.

Complete Gate 220 on the successor decision-law branch by freezing bounded retained-test decision law, recording the first-pass successor test decision register with explicit disagreement memory and next-action linkage, closing the quartet to Gate 220 complete, and routing the pack to Gate 221 planned but not yet activated without executing any keep/retire/rewrite/move action.

Complete Gate 221 on the successor proof-slice and handoff branch by freezing the bounded proof slice for the later retained-test execution pack, writing the grouped successor execution-pack queue from the Gate 220 decision register, closing the bootstrap quartet to no active pack currently routed, and stopping before any queued keep/retire/rewrite/move work begins.
Install and route the successor retained-test cleanup execution pack on successor main, making Gate 222 active and preserving the closed bootstrap pack as retained evidence.

Complete Gate 223 on the successor boundary-and-retarget branch by rewriting the retained cutover-boundary test against successor-local cleanup-pack truth, retargeting compatibility and replay authority guards to docs/03 plus docs/07, retiring duplicate replay-shadow tests only after replay proof passed, and stopping before Gate 224 activation.

Complete Gate 224 on the successor runtime-review-and-contract branch by retargeting the live review/trace and runtime-contract families to successor-native authority wording, confirming no guarded keep-as-is fallout repair was required, closing the cleanup quartet to Gate 224 complete, and stopping before Gate 225 activation.

Complete Gate 225 on the retained-test cleanup closeout branch by retargeting the bounded invariant/lawful-output assertion family to successor-native ownership law, freezing executed-row truth, proving the bounded invariant and runtime-scenario family slice green, and closing the cleanup pack through Gate 225 with no active pack currently routed.

Complete Gate 222 on the successor archive-evidence branch by moving historical planning/review and closeout receipt tests into successor-local archive evidence, closing the cleanup quartet to Gate 222 complete, and stopping before Gate 223 activation.
Route the opening-position domain isolation and interface hardening pack as the active pack, complete Gate 226 on the sandbox work branch, and stop before Gate 227 activation.

Refine the active opening-position domain-isolation pack after Gate 226 closeout by rewriting Gates 227-235 as provisional analytical-bucket work, replacing the repeated generic five-leaf pattern with gate-specific variable leaf counts, and keeping Gate 227 unopened.

Complete Gate 227 on the sandbox ingress-boundary branch by freezing the raw-bundle to prepared-runtime to cognition-ingress substrate, capturing Step 0 versus Step 1 ownership and provisional overlap surfaces, proving the bounded upstream isolation slice green, and stopping before Gate 228 activation.

Complete Gate 228 on the temporal-calendar-domain-isolation branch by freezing the governing question, authoritative outputs, lawful readers, and provisional overlap surfaces for Temporal Context and Financial Calendar, and stop before Gate 229 activation.

Complete Gate 229 on the serial-opportunity-ladder-and-non-cumulative-risk branch by freezing Stage 4 / Stage 5 / Stage 6 question ownership, explicit serial non-cumulative risk reset, and provisional overlap surfaces, and stop before Gate 230 activation.

Complete Gate 230 on the opening-position-seam-and-downstream-handoff branch by freezing the primary preserved seam, compatibility carriage ranking, bounded CDA-readable inputs, and provisional mixed-service overlap, and stop before Gate 231 activation.

Complete Gate 231 on the coefficient-control-plane-isolation branch by freezing the one-live coefficient world, owner-stage and activation-state law, and the shaping split that keeps modifiers from authoring serial opportunity, and stop before Gate 232 activation.

Complete Gate 232 on the parallel-risk-lane-clean-room-restart branch by freezing the lane governing question, input/output law, anti-duplication boundaries, and provisional overlap surfaces from current runtime evidence, and stop before Gate 233 activation.
